mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_point WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM knowledge_point WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM knowledge_point WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM knowledge_point WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_point (name, subject_id, parent_id, description, level, sort_order, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{subjectId}, #{parentId}, #{description}, #{level}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), FALSE)
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_point SET name = #{name}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, description = #{description}, level = #{level}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE knowledge_point SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
